legendary.name: Prismatic Barrier (Costs 2 Actions)
entries: The alicorn creates a prismatic, magical field around itself or another creature it can see within 60 feet of it. The target gains a +2 bonus to AC until the end of the alicorn's next turn.

legendary.name: Heal Self (Costs 3 Actions)
entries: The alicorn magically restores 11 ({@dice 2d8 + 2}) hit points.

Natives of Arcadia, the winged {@creature unicorn} (not to be confused with the horned {@creature pegasus}) can be summoned by a particularly devout paladin to serve as their mount. They do not particularly like the Mundane World, but they enjoy and find satisfaction in hunting evil and chaos. They will serve as mount and companion to a holy knight only so long as it brings the opportunity to smash evil, a sport they are denied on their home plane.

spellcasting.name: Innate Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Ash Marshal's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 15}). The Marshal can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: The Marshal is a 9th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save {@dc 15}, {@hit 7} to hit with spell attacks). The Marshal has the following spells prepared:

trait.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: Magic cannot put the marshal to sleep.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The marshal has advantage on saving throws against magic and other magical effects.

trait.name: Command Fey
entries: As a member of the Court of Arcadia, the Ash Marshal can cast {@spell dominate monster} ({@dc 15}) at will on any fey creature or elf.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Marshal makes three Ashsword attacks. If two attacks hit the same target, that target has disadvantage on any melee attacks that don't include the Marshal for the next round.

action.name: Ashsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}9 ({@damage 1d8 + 5}) piercing damage.

trait.name: Angelic Weapons
entries: The Authority's weapon attacks are magical. When the Authority hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) radiant damage (included in the attack).

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The Authority has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects from evil characters and sources.

trait.name: Aura of Protection Against Evil
entries: Evil creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against all allies within 5 feet of the Authority. Allies in this area can't be {@condition charmed}, {@condition frightened}, or possessed by evil creatures. If an ally is already {@condition charmed}, {@condition frightened}, or possessed by evil magic, the ally has advantage on any new saving throw against the relevant effect.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: The Authority makes three attacks with the Brightsword.

action.name: Brightsword
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 7} to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. {@h}14 ({@damage 3d6 + 4}) slashing damage and 9 ({@damage 2d8}) radiant damage. Evil creatures take an extra 9 ({@damage 2d8}) radiant damage.

trait.name: Everchanging Changers
entries: The Court of All Flesh are beings of pure chaos. Because their minds are pure disorder, they cannot be driven mad or {@condition charmed} and any attempts to magically compel their behavior fails.

trait.name: Formless Shape
entries: The baron is immune to any spell or effect that would alter his form.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Baron Malgas makes three attacks with his flail. He can use Melt Flesh in place of one flail attack.

action.name: Flail
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 6} to hit, range 5 ft., one target. {@h}7 ({@damage 1d8 + 3}) bludgeoning damage.

action.name: Javelin
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d8 + 3}) piercing damage.

action.name: Melt Flesh
entries: Baron Malgas chooses a target he can see within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Wisdom saving throw or watch as their dominant hand melts into a runny, fleshy lump. It drops whatever weapon it was carrying, cannot hold a weapon in that hand, and cannot cast spells that require somatic components. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats this saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Casting {@spell mending} on the affected hand also ends the effect. If the target succeeds on a saving throw, the creature becomes immune to the baron's Melt Flesh for the next 24 hours.

entries: {@i Prerequisite: 3rd-level retainer}

action.name: Wolf Pack (1/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 5th-level retainer}

entries: {@i Prerequisite: 7th-level retainer}

A dire bear appears and attacks an enemy within 60 feet. The target must make a Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone} and {@condition restrained}. On each of its following turns, the target takes 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) slashing damage and can make a Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check to escape. If it escapes, the bear disappears.

entries: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

action.name: Multiattack

action.name: Wound
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 8} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}11 ({@dice 1d12 + 5}) slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) necrotic damage. The target's maximum hit points are decreased in equal amount to the necrotic damage dealt. The target's hit point maximum does not return to normal until it finishes a long rest or its grievous wounds are soothed by a {@spell greater restoration} spell.

action.name: Longbow
entries: {@atk rw} {@hit 5} to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. {@h}6 ({@damage 1d8 + 2}) piercing damage.

items.name: Rally:
items.entry: All of Dorokor's minions within 30 feet that can hear her gain 22 ({@dice 4d10}) temporary hit points.

items.name: Focus:

items.name: Charge:
items.entry: All of Dorokor's minions within 30 feet that can hear her can move up to their speed as a reaction.

reaction.name: Villain Ability: Warlord
entries: As a reaction, when a minion dies, issue a command to your other minions. Those who can hear you gain a reaction they can use to immediately take another movement.

entries: Lady Czorgan points at a location she can see and corruption explodes from the ground within 60 feet of her. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. The corrupted ground spreads around corners. A creature takes 52 ({@damage 15d6}) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

trait.name: Fiery End
entries: When the lesser balor dies, it explodes. Each creature within 20 feet of it must make a {@dc 16} Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 35 ({@damage 10d6}) fire damage, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion destroys the lesser balor's weapons.

trait.name: Singeing Aura
entries: At the start of each of the lesser balor's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage. A creature that touches the lesser balor or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage.

action.name: Longsword

action.name: Whip
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 9} to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. {@h}12 ({@damage 2d6 + 5}) slashing damage plus 7 ({@damage 2d6}) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a {@dc 16} Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 15 feet toward the lesser balor.

action.name: Longbow

The poison lasts until it is removed by the {@spell lesser restoration} spell or similar magic.

reaction.name: Parry

spellcasting.name: Spellcasting
headerEntries: Lord Rall is a 10th-level spellcaster. His spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save {@dc 16}, {@hit 8} to hit with spell attacks). He has the following wizard spells prepared:

trait.name: Everchanging Changers
entries: The Court of All Flesh are beings of pure chaos. Because their minds are pure disorder, they cannot be driven mad or {@condition charmed} and any attempts to magically compel their behavior fails.

trait.name: Formless Shape
entries: Lord Rall is immune to any spell or effect that would alter his form.

trait.name: Shapechanger
entries: As an action, Lord Rall can polymorph into a Small or Medium creature or back into his true form. His statistics, other than his size, are the same in each form. Any worn or carried equipment isn't transformed. He reverts to his true form if he dies.

action.name: Multiattack
entries: Lord Rall makes two melee attacks with the Staff of Changing.

action.name: The Staff of Changing {@recharge 5}
entries: Rall's staff remakes a target into any shape he desires. He casts polymorph from it as an action. The range is 30 feet, and the Wisdom saving throw has a DC of 16. Lord Rall does not need to concentrate on this spell to maintain it.

action.name: Greatstaff
entries: {@atk mw} {@hit 4} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}8 ({@damage 2d6 + 1}) bludgeoning damage, or 10 ({@damage 2d8 + 1}) bludgeoning damage if wielded with two hands.

action.name: Any Pile of Organs Will Do {@recharge 6}
entries: When he drops to 0 hit points, Lord Rall can reform himself from any corpse within 120 feet instead of falling {@condition unconscious}. Lord Rall does not need to see the corpse in order to use it. The process happens in an instant, and the newly formed Lord Rall appears with only half of his maximum hit points.

trait.name: Magic Resistance
entries: The dragon has advantage on saving throws against magic and other magical effects.

trait.name: False Appearance
entries: While the dragon remains motionless, it is indistinguishable from a shrub or small tree of blooming oleander.

action.name: Implant Nightmare
entries: The dragon reaches into the mind of a target it can see within 60 feet and manifests the target's deepest fear. The target must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target becomes {@condition frightened} for 1 minute. At the start of each of the target's turns, the target must repeat the saving throw or take 22 ({@damage 4d10}) psychic damage. On a successful save, the nightmare ends.

action.name: Pollen Breath {@recharge 5}
entries: The dragon exhales a swirling cloud of pollen and red and purple petals in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in the area must make a {@dc 16} Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature becomes {@condition charmed} until the end of their next round. Creatures who successfully save cannot be affected by Pollen Breath for 24 hours.

action.name: Song of Cestilani (1/day)
entries: The oleander dragon sings a magical song. Each enemy that can hear it must succeed on a {@dc 16} Intelligence saving throw or take 22 ({@damage 4d8 + 4}) psychic damage and be {@condition stunned} for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.

trait.name: Rune-Tattooed
entries: Whenever Oregg casts a spell of 1st level or higher, he gains a number of temporary hit points equal to X{@dice d10}, where X is the level of the spell.

trait.name: Constant Flood
entries: Enemies beginning their turn within 15 feet of the pillar must make a {@dc 15} Strength check or be pushed 10 feet away from the pillar. The ground within 15 feet of the Pillar is difficult terrain for all enemies attempting to move toward the pillar.

trait.name: Geyser
entries: When summoned, the Pillar of Water appears in a 10-by-10-foot space. All creatures in that area must make Dexterity saving throws. On a failure, a creature is suspended in the column of water. On a success, a creature is pushed to an empty space adjacent to the pillar.

Up to four Medium creatures, or one Large creature, can be contained in the pillar. Creatures suspended in the pillar can't breathe unless they can breathe water, are {@condition restrained}, and take 21 ({@damage 6d6}) bludgeoning damage at the start of each of the pillar's turns.
As an action, a {@condition restrained} creature can make a {@dc 15} Strength ({@skill Athletics}) check. On a success, it escapes from the column of water.

action.name: Reform
entries: As a bonus action, the pillar disappears, depositing any suspended creatures on the ground, {@condition prone}. On its summoner's next turn, it appears again anywhere within 60 feet of the summoner.

entries: {@i Prerequisite: 3rd-level retainer}

The skinwalker assumes the shape of a {@creature dire wolf} for 1 minute. While in this form, the skinwalker's signature attack deals 10 ({@damage 2d6 + 3}) piercing damage. Their movement increases to 50 feet, they gain advantage on Wisdom ({@skill Perception}) checks that rely on hearing or smell, and they have advantage on attack rolls against a creature if at least one of the skinwalker's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally isn't {@condition incapacitated}. A skinwalker can only be in one form at a time.

action.name: Transform-Allosaurus (3/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 5th-level retainer}

The skinwalker assumes the shape of an {@creature allosaurus} for 1 minute. While in this form, the skinwalker's signature attack deals 15 ({@damage 2d10 + 4}) piercing damage. Their movement increases to 60 feet, and if they move at least 30 feet straight toward a creature and then hit it with their signature attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a {@dc 13} Strength saving throw or be knocked {@condition prone} and the skinwalker can make a signature attack against it as a bonus action. A skinwalker can only be in one form at a time.

action.name: Transform-Giant Scorpion (3/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 7th-level retainer}

The skinwalker assumes the form of a {@creature giant scorpion} for 1 minute. While in this form The skinwalker's armor class increases to 17, their signature attack deals 7 ({@damage 1d10 + 2}) piercing damage and force the target to make a Constitution saving throw or take 22 ({@damage 4d10}) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A skinwalker can only be in one form at a time.

trait.name: Foundation of All the World
entries: Allies within 60 feet of the Source cannot be moved against their will or knocked {@condition prone}.

action.name: Diamondskin
entries: As a bonus action, the Source focuses its gaze on an ally within 30 feet. Diamond crystals emerge from the target's skin, increasing their AC by 2 for 10 minutes, after which the diamonds turn to worthless dust, restoring the target's skin to its previous state.

action.name: Back to Earth
entries: The Source focuses its gaze on an enemy within 30 feet. If the target's body is made of flesh, the target must make a {@dc 15} Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature magically begins to turn to stone and is {@condition restrained}. At the end of its next turn, it must repeat the saving throw. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is {@condition petrified} until freed by the {@spell greater restoration} spell or other magic.

action.name: Wall of Stone (1/Day)
entries: The Source causes a 30-foot-long wall of solid stone to thrust up through the floor. The wall has six 5-foot-long panels to it, which can be arranged however the summoner of the Source wishes, but each segment must form a line or a right angle with the previous segment. Each panel is 6 inches thick and 10 feet high. Each panel has AC 15 and 180 hit points. If reduced to 0 hit points, a panel crumbles, leaving loose scree that counts as difficult terrain. The wall lasts for 10 minutes, then turns to dust.

If the wall is summoned in a creature's space, the creature is pushed to one side of the wall, chosen by the summoner. If a creature would be surrounded on all sides by the wall (or the wall and another solid surface), that creature can make a Dexterity saving throw. On a success, it can use its reaction to move up to its speed so that it is no longer enclosed by the wall.

entries: This creature is a Retainer, as described in {@book Strongholds and Followers|SaF|8|Retainers}

action.name: Signature Attack
entries: {@atk mw,rw} {@hit 6} to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. {@h}10 ({@damage 1d12 + 4}) piercing damage.
At 7th level, retainers can take two signature attacks per round.

action.name: Commanding Strike (3/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 3rd-level retainer}

The warlord takes their signature attack and selects an ally within 30 feet who can see and hear the warlord and has line of sight to the target of the signature attack. That ally makes a weapon attack against the target.

action.name: Charge (3/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 5th-level retainer}
The warlord takes a signature attack and selects an ally, who can immediately move up to 30 feet and make an attack or cast a spell.

action.name: Rallying Cry (3/Day)
entries: {@i Prerequisite: 7th-level retainer}
All allies within 60 feet gain {@dice 3d8} temporary hit points.

trait.name: Cold Fury (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: As a bonus action, the orc can enter a cold fury for 1 minute. While in a fury, its melee weapon attacks deal an extra 3 ({@dice 1d6}) damage.

Also, if the orc is reduced to 0 hit points while in a cold fury, unless it was dealt with a critical hit, the orc makes a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5 plus the damage taken. On a success, the orc instead drops to 1 hit point and its fury ends.

trait.name: Aggressive
entries: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature it can see.

trait.name: Minion: Savage Horde
entries: After moving at least 20 feet in a straight line toward a creature, the next attack the orc makes against that creature scores a critical hit on a roll of 18-20.

trait.name: Spirit-Bonded Body (Recharges after a Short or Long Rest)
entries: As a bonus action, the orc can transform into a dire wolf for up to 4 hours. The orc can choose whether its equipment falls to the ground, melds with its new form, or is worn by the new form. The orc reverts to its true form when its dire wolf form is reduced to 0 hit points. If this damage would cause its dire wolf form to drop below 0 hit points, the excess damage is done to its true form.

The orc also reverts to its true form if it dies or falls {@condition unconscious}. The orc can revert to its true form as a bonus action on its turn. When it reverts in this way, it returns to the number of hit points it had before it transformed.

trait.name: Spirit-Bonded Mind
entries: The orc can cast speak with animals at will, but can only communicate with wolves.
